hero.name: Shalev Shaul
hero.tagline: I build exceptional digital experiences at the intersection of design and engineering.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The person behind the code.
about.body: I'm a full-stack developer with a strong eye for design — I care as much about how things look as how they work. I specialise in building fast, accessible, and visually refined web applications.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I work with.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I can do for you.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: End-to-end web applications — from architecture to deployment. Clean code, modern stack, production-ready.

uiDesign.title: UI/UX Design
uiDesign.description: Interfaces that are beautiful, intuitive, and accessible. Design systems, prototypes, and pixel-perfect implementation.

branding.title: Branding & Identity
branding.description: Visual identity systems — logos, colour palettes, typography, and brand guidelines that communicate the right story.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: Architecture reviews, tech stack decisions, code audits, and hands-on mentoring for teams and founders.
